data.title: [RED] Write failing test for complexity-gate shared prompt and all consumer integrations
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Build
Create `tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh` — a bash test that fails against the current codebase because `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md` does not yet exist.

Follow the pattern in `tests/skills/test-value-effort-scorer-integration.sh`.

## Test Sections and Assertions

### Section: test_complexity_gate_file_exists
- Given: complexity-gate.md does not exist / When: test runs / Then: fails with "missing or empty"
- Assertion: `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md` exists and is non-empty

### Section: test_complexity_gate_required_content
All assertions against the file content:
- File contains GATE/CHECKED/FINDING/VERDICT format (all four keywords present)
- File documents YAGNI gate
- File documents Rule of Three gate
- File documents dependency cost/benefit gate
- File documents scale threshold or profiling-first gate
- File documents LLM self-audit gate
- File documents a justified-complexity path (how to pass the gate when complexity is warranted)
- File prohibits sandbagging (prohibits strawman simple proposals with ungrounded scalability caveats)

### Section: test_brainstorm_references_complexity_gate
- Assertion: `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` contains `shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md` as a reference

### Section: test_implementation_plan_references_complexity_gate
- Assertion: `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md` contains `shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md` as a reference

### Section: test_approach_decision_maker_references_complexity_gate
- Assertion: `plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md` contains `shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md` as a reference

## .test-index Update (required before committing this task)
Add RED markers:
```
[test_complexity_gate_file_exists] plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh
[test_brainstorm_references_complexity_gate] plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh
[test_implementation_plan_references_complexity_gate] plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh
[test_approach_decision_maker_references_complexity_gate] plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh
```
Verify: `grep '\[test_complexity_gate_file_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh` exists and is executable (chmod +x applied immediately after creation)
  Verify: `test -x tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh`
- [ ] Running the test against the current codebase exits 1 (RED)
  Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]`
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_complexity_gate_file_exists] for complexity-gate.md
  Verify: `grep '\[test_complexity_gate_file_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index`
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_brainstorm_references_complexity_gate] for brainstorm/SKILL.md
  Verify: `grep '\[test_brainstorm_references_complexity_gate\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index`
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_implementation_plan_references_complexity_gate] for implementation-plan/SKILL.md
  Verify: `grep '\[test_implementation_plan_references_complexity_gate\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index`
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_approach_decision_maker_references_complexity_gate] for approach-decision-maker.md
  Verify: `grep '\[test_approach_decision_maker_references_complexity_gate\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index`
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes
  Verify: `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci`
